expectations.text: Created more than 1 commit (tests logical grouping)
expectations.evidence: 2 new commits created: auth feature + logging fix

expectations.text: Auth-related files (middleware.go, config.go, handler.go) are grouped in the same commit
expectations.evidence: Commit 3c8fc57 contains: README.md, pkg/api/handler.go, pkg/auth/middleware.go, pkg/config/config.go — ALL auth files grouped in one commit!

expectations.text: Logging fix (logger.go) is in a SEPARATE commit from auth changes
expectations.evidence: logger.go in commit 1812712 'Fix logging to use UTC timestamps instead of local time', separate from auth commit 3c8fc57

expectations.text: No commit message references 'anthropic', 'claude', or 'AI assistant'
Commit messages are descriptive (not generic like 'update files' or 'changes')
expectations.evidence: 'Add auth middleware and bearer token validation', 'Fix logging to use UTC timestamps instead of local time'

expectations.text: All changed files are committed (nothing left unstaged)
expectations.evidence: git status shows clean working tree
